proposal1.heroHeadline: Gmail is losing over 1,000 hours a year on manual proposal writing. Here is exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, Gmail spends hours crafting proposals manually. With our system, generate a complete proposal in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each issue below represents significant lost time and opportunities for Gmail.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Gmail staff spends over 100 hours monthly on proposals. Each hour lost is an hour not spent improving email services.

problems.title: Human Error
problems.description: Manual entries lead to mistakes, costing Gmail an estimated $50,000 annually in corrections and lost opportunities.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Proposals often lack consistent branding. This inconsistency can reduce trust, costing Gmail potential clients.

problems.title: Delayed Responses
problems.description: Gmail's proposal response time is often several days. This delay results in lost deals, affecting potential revenue growth.

problems.title: Resource Allocation
problems.description: Gmail diverts resources to proposal writing instead of enhancing email features. This shift impacts service quality.

problems.title: Competitive Disadvantage
problems.description: Competitors using automation respond quicker. This delay costs Gmail an estimated $200,000 in potential client acquisitions annually.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system eliminates all the mentioned inefficiencies.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, crafting proposals takes hours. Our system creates them in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Brand Consistency
solutions.description: Manual branding leads to inconsistencies. Our system ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with Gmail's image.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Human errors are costly. Our AI minimizes errors, saving Gmail time and money.

solutions.title: Rapid Response
solutions.description: Current proposals take days. Our system delivers in seconds, boosting Gmail's competitive edge.

solutions.title: Resource Optimization
solutions.description: Gmail's resources are tied up in writing. Our system frees them to focus on enhancing email services.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Gmail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Gmail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Gmail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Elevate Acme Corp's Communication Efficiency with Gmail's Intuitive Email Platform
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Streamline your business operations with our efficient email solutions, ensuring faster communication and less spam.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing significant communication losses.

problems.title: Inefficient Email System
problems.description: Every email that goes unanswered is a potential deal slipping through your fingers. Your current system is causing delays.

problems.title: Storage Limitations
problems.description: Running out of storage means losing important emails, impacting your ability to make informed decisions. This could cost you valuable opportunities.

problems.title: High Spam Rates
problems.description: A cluttered inbox with spam can lead to missing crucial emails. Every missed email is a missed business opportunity.

problems.title: Mobile Access Issues
problems.description: Lack of reliable mobile access results in lost productivity. Without mobile access, employees miss urgent emails, affecting response times.

problems.title: Security Vulnerabilities
problems.description: Each security breach puts your confidential data at risk. This could lead to financial losses and damage to your reputation.

problems.title: Collaboration Challenges
problems.description: Ineffective collaboration tools can slow down project progress. This causes delays in project completion and potential revenue loss.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these communication challenges.

solutions.title: Gmail
solutions.description: Gmail offers an intuitive interface that improves response time and reduces spam. This enhances productivity across your organization.

solutions.title: Google Drive Integration
solutions.description: With 15 GB of storage, you can keep all your important emails and files in one place. This ensures easy access and prevents data loss.

solutions.title: Mobile Access
solutions.description: Our mobile-friendly interface ensures that your team stays connected on the go. This increases responsiveness and keeps your business moving forward.

solutions.title: Security Features
solutions.description: Gmail's advanced security measures protect your data from threats. This gives you peace of mind and safeguards your reputation.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Gmail is your trusted partner in enhancing communication.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Reliability
whyUsCards.description: Gmail is known for its reliability and efficiency, ensuring your communications are seamless.

whyUsCards.title: Top-Notch Security
whyUsCards.description: Our security protocols are top of the line, protecting your business from data breaches.

whyUsCards.title: Scalable Solutions
whyUsCards.description: Whether you're a small business or a large corporation, our solutions grow with you.

whyUsCards.title: Dedicated Support
whyUsCards.description: Our support team is always here to help, providing assistance whenever you need it.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team that's ready to support Acme Corp.

team.bio: With over a decade of experience, leads strategy and ensures client success with tailored solutions.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Onboarding
process.description: We'll get to know your business needs and set up your Gmail account.

process.title: Customization
process.description: We tailor Gmail settings to optimize your communication workflow.

process.title: Training
process.description: We train your team to use Gmail's features effectively.

process.title: Support
process.description: Ongoing support to ensure smooth operation and address any issues.

proposal2.pricingIntro: Choose the investment option that suits your business best.

pricing.name: Basic Package
pricing.description: Ideal for small teams looking for essential email functionalities.

pricing.name: Standard Package
pricing.description: Recommended for growing businesses needing advanced features.
